entries.question: How do I treat severe bleeding?

citations.snippet: For life-threatening external bleeding, act immediately. Apply firm, direct pressure on the wound with a clean cloth or
Sit upright and lean slightly forward so blood does not run down the throat, and pinch the soft part of the nose just be
Wash your hands, then rinse the wound under clean running water to remove dirt. Stop bleeding with gentle direct pressur

disclaimer: ⚠️  Lifeline gives first-aid EDUCATION and triage SUPPORT — not a medical diagnosis. It can be wrong or incomplete. In any emergency, call your local emergency number immediately.
